TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_imuy2
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau sunis 'nay tmayta tu biat 'nay tu niquduanna ta niquduanna ta nani.
S.PHON: jau sunis ʔnaj tmajta tu βiat ʔnaj tu niquɮuanna ta niquɮuanna ta nani.
S.FORM: yau sunis 'nay tmayta tu biat 'nay tu niquduanna ta niquduanna ta nani.
S.PHON: jau sunis ʔnaj tmajta tu βiat ʔnaj tu niquɮuanna ta niquɮuanna ta nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩看著養在瓶子裡的青蛙.
There is a child looking at the frog kept in the bottle.

S.FORM: yauti wasu a yau situRtuRku.
S.PHON: jauti wasu a jau situʁtuʁku.
S.FORM: yauti wasu a yau situRtuRku.
S.PHON: jauti wasu a jau situʁtuʁku.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗低頭看了看.
There was a dog lowering its head.

S.FORM: maynepti sunis 'nay atu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: majnəpti sunis ʔnaj atu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: maynepti sunis 'nay atu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: majnəpti sunis ʔnaj atu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 孩子和狗睡著了.
The child and the dog fell asleep.

S.FORM: mzukatti 'nay biat a yau pasa tati.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ʔnaj βiat a jau pasa tati.
S.FORM: mzukatti 'nay biat a yau pasa tati.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ʔnaj βiat a jau pasa tati.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙跑出去了.
That frog went out.

S.FORM: nani titaanna qaniyau tu taRbabi.
S.PHON: nani titaanna qanijau tu taʁβaβi.
S.FORM: nani titaanna qaniyau tu taRbabi.
S.PHON: nani titaanna qanijau tu taʁβaβi.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們早上一看,
Then they saw in the morning.

S.FORM: titaan na sunis 'nay tu taRbabi.
S.PHON: titaan na sunis ʔnaj tu taʁβaβi.
S.FORM: titaan na sunis 'nay tu taRbabi.
S.PHON: titaan na sunis ʔnaj tu taʁβaβi.
S.TRANSL: 早上小孩子一看,
That child saw in the morning.

S.FORM: maiti 'nay biat a yau.
S.PHON: maiti ʔnaj βiat a jau.
S.FORM: maiti 'nay biat a yau.
S.PHON: maiti ʔnaj βiat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙不在了.
That frog wasn't there.

S.FORM: maiti ya biat a yau ta peRaskuan nani.
S.PHON: maiti ja βiat a jau ta pəʁaskuan nani.
S.FORM: maiti ya biat a yau ta peRaskuan nani.
S.PHON: maiti ja βiat a jau ta pəʁaskuan nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙不在瓶子裡.
The frog wasn't in the bottle.

S.FORM: paqisuRannati na wasu a yau tapeRaskuan 'nay uRuna tu.
S.PHON: paqisuʁannati na wasu a jau tapəʁaskuan ʔnaj uʁuna tu.
S.FORM: paqisuRannati na wasu a yau tapeRaskuan 'nay uRuna tu.
S.PHON: paqisuʁannati na wasu a jau tapəʁaskuan ʔnaj uʁuna tu.
S.TRANSL: 小狗把頭塞到瓶子裡面了.
The dog stuffed his head into the bottle.

W.TRANSL: 使役-進入-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: wiyati qaniyau qumRaRas tu biat a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati qanijau qumʁaʁas tu βiat a jau atu wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: wiyati qaniyau qumRaRas tu biat a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati qanijau qumʁaʁas tu βiat a jau atu wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們走出去叫那隻青蛙,那隻狗也是.
They left to call that frog, and so did the dog.

S.FORM: qemi qemi tmibuqti ya wasu 'nay pasa libeng.
S.PHON: qəmi qəmi tmiβuqti ja wasu ʔnaj pasa riβəŋ.
S.FORM: qemi qemi tmibuqti ya wasu 'nay pasa libeng.
S.PHON: qəmi qəmi tmiβuqti ja wasu ʔnaj pasa riβəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗往下掉.
That dog fell down.

S.FORM: nani mabedungti ya peRasku 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani maβəɮuŋti ja pəʁasku ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: nani mabedungti ya peRasku 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani maβəɮuŋti ja pəʁasku ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 然後瓶子破了.
Then that bottle was broken.

S.FORM: qumenutti ya lazatna na na wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: qumənutti ja raz~ratna na na wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: qumenutti ya lazatna na na wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: qumənutti ja raz~ratna na na wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗的主人生氣了.
The owner of that dog was angry.

S.FORM: supaR qaya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaja wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: supaR qaya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaja wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 還好那隻狗懂得.
that dog knew .

S.FORM: sisidamannati na wasu a yau 'nay lazatna.
S.PHON: sisiɮamannati na wasu a jau ʔnaj raz~ratna.
S.FORM: sisidamannati na wasu a yau 'nay lazatna.
S.PHON: sisiɮamannati na wasu a jau ʔnaj raz~ratna.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗舔主人.
That dog licked its owner.

S.FORM: yauti taizaan qumeqeRas tu biat a yau ya sunis 'nay atu wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: jauti taiz~raan quməqəʁas tu βiat a jau ja sunis ʔnaj atu wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: yauti taizaan qumeqeRas tu biat a yau ya sunis 'nay atu wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: jauti taiz~raan quməqəʁas tu βiat a jau ja sunis ʔnaj atu wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子跟狗在那裡一直叫青蛙.
That child and that dog were calling to the frog.

S.FORM: nani yauti pasazi ta izaan situqaw tu paRin 'nay 'nay wasu a yau tmayta tu Rupuna na tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jauti pasaz~ri ta iz~raan situqaw tu paʁin ʔnaj ʔnaj wasu a jau tmajta tu ʁupuna na turiq a jau.
S.FORM: nani yauti pasazi ta izaan situqaw tu paRin 'nay 'nay wasu a yau tmayta tu Rupuna na tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jauti pasaz~ri ta iz~raan situqaw tu paʁin ʔnaj ʔnaj wasu a jau tmajta tu ʁupuna na turiq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗向上看一棵樹,看到虎頭蜂窩.
That dog came, looked up at a tree and saw a hive of wasps there.

S.FORM: nani sunis a yau nani situRku tu 'nay tangan na mutun tamedanayan.
S.PHON: nani sunis a jau nani situʁku tu ʔnaj taŋan na mutun taməɮanajan.
S.FORM: nani sunis a yau nani situRku tu 'nay tangan na mutun tamedanayan.
S.PHON: nani sunis a jau nani situʁku tu ʔnaj taŋan na mutun taməɮanajan.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那小孩往下看地上的老鼠洞.
Then the child looked down at the mouse hole on the ground.

S.FORM: mzukatti ya was 'nay mutun 'nay.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ja was ʔnaj mutun ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mzukatti ya was 'nay mutun 'nay.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ja was ʔnaj mutun ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那隻老鼠出來了.
That mouse came out.

S.FORM: yauti utuzannati na wasu a yau ya paRin 'nay nani.
S.PHON: jauti utuz~rannati na wasu a jau ja paʁin ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: yauti utuzannati na wasu a yau ya paRin 'nay nani.
S.PHON: jauti utuz~rannati na wasu a jau ja paʁin ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗搖了搖那棵樹.
That dog was shaking the tree.

S.FORM: mzukatti ya penay 'nay 'nay tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ja pənaj ʔnaj ʔnaj turiq a jau.
S.FORM: mzukatti ya penay 'nay 'nay tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: mz~rukatti ja pənaj ʔnaj ʔnaj turiq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂 都出來了.
Those bees came out.

S.FORM: tu tmibuqti 'nay tuliq 'nay tamedanayan nani.
S.PHON: tu tmiβuqti ʔnaj turiq ʔnaj taməɮanajan nani.
S.FORM: tu tmibuqti 'nay tuliq 'nay tamedanayan nani.
S.PHON: tu tmiβuqti ʔnaj turiq ʔnaj taməɮanajan nani.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂 掉下來了.
The beehive fell to the ground.

S.FORM: mzukat a mutun a yau qaya.
S.PHON: mz~rukat a mutun a jau qaja.
S.FORM: mzukat a mutun a yau qaya.
S.PHON: mz~rukat a mutun a jau qaja.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠也出來了.
The mouse went out too.

S.FORM: tu yauti sunis 'nay tmuqaz pasazi ta tabunguRanna na paRin 'nay.
S.PHON: tu jauti sunis ʔnaj tmuqaz~r pasaz~ri ta taβuŋuʁanna na paʁin ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tu yauti sunis 'nay tmuqaz pasazi ta tabunguRanna na paRin 'nay.
S.PHON: tu jauti sunis ʔnaj tmuqaz~r pasaz~ri ta taβuŋuʁanna na paʁin ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩過來樹根那裡,然後爬上去.

TRANSL.notes: That child came toward the roots and then climbed up (the tree).

S.TRANSL: That child came toward the roots and then climbed up .

S.FORM: tmayta tu 'nay tanganna na peRasna paRin.
S.PHON: tmajta tu ʔnaj taŋanna na pəʁasna paʁin.
S.FORM: tmayta tu 'nay tanganna na peRasna paRin.
S.PHON: tmajta tu ʔnaj taŋanna na pəʁasna paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 看著那個樹洞.

TRANSL.notes: And (he) looked at the hole of the tree.

S.TRANSL: And looked at the hole of the tree.

S.FORM: nani situRtuRkuanna tmayta nani mzukatti ya usiq 'nay ku 'nay tatanganan na paRin nani.
S.PHON: nani situʁtuʁkuanna tmajta nani mz~rukatti ja usiq ʔnaj ku ʔnaj tataŋanan na paʁin nani.
S.FORM: nani situRtuRkuanna tmayta nani mzukatti ya usiq 'nay ku 'nay tatanganan na paRin nani.
S.PHON: nani situʁtuʁkuanna tmajta nani mz~rukatti ja usiq ʔnaj ku ʔnaj tataŋanan na paʁin nani.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩低頭探了探,看到一隻在樹洞裡的貓頭鷹出來了.
He looked down and saw an owl in the tree hole come out.

S.FORM: muRetut sunis 'nay tmibuq ta medanayan.
S.PHON: muʁətut sunis ʔnaj tmiβuq ta məɮanajan.
S.FORM: muRetut sunis 'nay tmibuq ta medanayan.
S.PHON: muʁətut sunis ʔnaj tmiβuq ta məɮanajan.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇得掉到地上.
The child was frightened and fell to the ground.

S.FORM: nani tanuzannati na tuliq a yau ya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani tanuz~rannati na turiq a jau ja wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nani tanuzannati na tuliq a yau ya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani tanuz~rannati na turiq a jau ja wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗被虎頭蜂追.
The dog was chased by the wasps.

S.FORM: nani wiyati mRaRiw 'nay wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati mʁaʁiw ʔnaj wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: nani wiyati mRaRiw 'nay wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati mʁaʁiw ʔnaj wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗就跑走了.
Then the dog ran away.

S.FORM: yauti ya 'nay ku 'nay ni tmanuz tyu tu sunis a yau qaya nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja ʔnaj ku ʔnaj ni tmanuz~r tju tu sunis a jau qaja nani.
S.FORM: yauti ya 'nay ku 'nay ni tmanuz tyu tu sunis a yau qaya nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja ʔnaj ku ʔnaj ni tmanuz~r tju tu sunis a jau qaja nani.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹也追小孩子.
There was the owl chasing the child too.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu 'nay iza sayza u 'nay luqanaw Rana 'nay siRemuq 'nay ni imetannaay nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu ʔnaj iz~ra sajz~ra u ʔnaj ruqanaw ʁana ʔnaj siʁəmuq ʔnaj ni imətannaaj nani.
S.FORM: Raynguanna tu 'nay iza sayza u 'nay luqanaw Rana 'nay siRemuq 'nay ni imetannaay nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu ʔnaj iz~ra sajz~ra u ʔnaj ruqanaw ʁana ʔnaj siʁəmuq ʔnaj ni imətannaaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他不知道他摸的是(某物)鹿.

S.TRANSL: 他不知道他摸的是 鹿.

TRANSL.notes: He didn't know what he touched was (something or) a deer.

S.TRANSL: He didn't know what he touched was a deer.

S.FORM: tu wiyati panmengti mzaqis tababawanna na tatuRuzanna na siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: tu wijati panməŋti mz~raqis taβaβawanna na tatuʁuz~ranna na siʁəmuq a jau.
S.FORM: tu wiyati panmengti mzaqis tababawanna na tatuRuzanna na siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: tu wijati panməŋti mz~raqis taβaβawanna na tatuʁuz~ranna na siʁəmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 只好爬到鹿的背上.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) went to climb onto the back of the deer.

S.TRANSL: went to climb onto the back of the deer.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu siRemuq sayza paRin zinna.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu siʁəmuq sajz~ra paʁin z~rinna.
S.FORM: Raynguanna tu siRemuq sayza paRin zinna.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu siʁəmuq sajz~ra paʁin z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那是鹿,以為那是木頭.
He didn't know it was a deer and thought it might be a piece of wood.

S.FORM: nani yau wasu 'nay tatuRuzanna na iza 'nay na siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jau wasu ʔnaj tatuʁuz~ranna na iz~ra ʔnaj na siʁəmuq a jau.
S.FORM: nani yau wasu 'nay tatuRuzanna na iza 'nay na siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jau wasu ʔnaj tatuʁuz~ranna na iz~ra ʔnaj na siʁəmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 狗在某物 ... 鹿的後面.
The dog is behind something ... the deer.

S.FORM: tu yauti ta wak wakianna tawakianna na siRemuq 'nay sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: tu jauti ta wak wakianna tawakianna na siʁəmuq ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tu yauti ta wak wakianna tawakianna na siRemuq 'nay sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: tu jauti ta wak wakianna tawakianna na siʁəmuq ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在鹿角上. ...
The child was on the horns of the deer ... .

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu uRu na siRemuq sayza 'nay siRemuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu uʁu na siʁəmuq sajz~ra ʔnaj siʁəmuq a jau nani.
S.FORM: Raynguanna tu uRu na siRemuq sayza 'nay siRemuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu uʁu na siʁəmuq sajz~ra ʔnaj siʁəmuq a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩不知道那是鹿的頭.
He didn't know that was the deer's head.

S.FORM: tu wiyati masengatti ya siRemuq 'nay wiyati mRaRiw.
S.PHON: tu wijati masəŋatti ja siʁəmuq ʔnaj wijati mʁaʁiw.
S.FORM: tu wiyati masengatti ya siRemuq 'nay wiyati mRaRiw.
S.PHON: tu wijati masəŋatti ja siʁəmuq ʔnaj wijati mʁaʁiw.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿站起來跑走了.
The deer got up and ran away.

S.FORM: nani masulun tu wasuna 'nay siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani masurun tu wasuna ʔnaj siʁəmuq a jau.
S.FORM: nani masulun tu wasuna 'nay siRemuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani masurun tu wasuna ʔnaj siʁəmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 鹿和狗一起跑了.
The deer ran with the dog.

S.FORM: tu Raynguanna sayza tu iza u tu nianu 'nay niwuzunganku zinna sayza na siRemuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu ʁajŋuanna sajz~ra tu iz~ra u tu nianu ʔnaj niwuz~ruŋanku z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁəmuq a jau nani.
S.FORM: tu Raynguanna sayza tu iza u tu nianu 'nay niwuzunganku zinna sayza na siRemuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu ʁajŋuanna sajz~ra tu iz~ra u tu nianu ʔnaj niwuz~ruŋanku z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁəmuq a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: (鹿)不知道自己扛什麼.牠可能想著:「我扛的是什麼?」

S.TRANSL: 不知道自己扛什麼.牠可能想著:「我扛的是什麼?」

TRANSL.notes: (The deer) did not know what it shouldered. It may think, 'What did I shoulder?'

S.TRANSL: did not know what it shouldered. It may think, 'What did I shoulder?'

S.FORM: muRetutti ta izaan tu maseq taqidisan tu.
S.PHON: muʁətutti ta iz~raan tu masəq taqiɮisan tu.
S.FORM: muRetutti ta izaan tu maseq taqidisan tu.
S.PHON: muʁətutti ta iz~raan tu masəq taqiɮisan tu.
S.TRANSL: 嚇到了,然後到了斜坡.

TRANSL.notes: (It) was frightened. Then it arrived at the slope.

S.TRANSL: was frightened. Then it arrived at the slope.

S.FORM: tmibuqti ya sunis 'nay atu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ja sunis ʔnaj atu wasu a jau.
S.FORM: tmibuqti ya sunis 'nay atu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ja sunis ʔnaj atu wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗掉了下來.
The child and the dog fell down.

S.FORM: tu wiyati pasaziti tayan ta iRuRan tazanzanuman a wasu a zau atu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: tu wijati pasaz~riti tajan ta iʁuʁan taz~ranz~ranuman a wasu a z~rau atu sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tu wiyati pasaziti tayan ta iRuRan tazanzanuman a wasu a zau atu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: tu wijati pasaz~riti tajan ta iʁuʁan taz~ranz~ranuman a wasu a z~rau atu sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗離開,往河水走去.
The child and the dog left and went toward the river/water.

S.FORM: nani wuzungannati pamuquanna na sunis 'nay 'nay suni 'nay wasu a yau.
S.PHON: nani wuz~ruŋannati pamuquanna na sunis ʔnaj ʔnaj suni ʔnaj wasu a jau.
S.FORM: nani wuzungannati pamuquanna na sunis 'nay 'nay suni 'nay wasu a yau.
S.PHON: nani wuz~ruŋannati pamuquanna na sunis ʔnaj ʔnaj suni ʔnaj wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子背著那條狗.
The child carried that dog on the shoulders.

S.FORM: nani yauti qalimka zinna tu tu wasu a yau na sunis 'nay tayan ta paRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: nani jauti qarimka z~rinna tu tu wasu a jau na sunis ʔnaj tajan ta paʁinan ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nani yauti qalimka zinna tu tu wasu a yau na sunis 'nay tayan ta paRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: nani jauti qarimka z~rinna tu tu wasu a jau na sunis ʔnaj tajan ta paʁinan ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 在那根木頭上,那個小孩子對他的狗說 :「安靜一點!」
On the wood, the child said to his dog, 'Be quiet!'

S.FORM: tu yauti mzaqis ta babawan na paRin 'nay sunis 'nay atu wasu.
S.PHON: tu jauti mz~raqis ta βaβawan na paʁin ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj atu wasu.
S.FORM: tu yauti mzaqis ta babawan na paRin 'nay sunis 'nay atu wasu.
S.PHON: tu jauti mz~raqis ta βaβawan na paʁin ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj atu wasu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩跟狗爬上那根木頭.
The child and the dog got onto the wood.

S.FORM: tu yau tababawan na wasu na paRin 'nay ya qaniyau atu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: tu jau taβaβawan na wasu na paʁin ʔnaj ja qanijau atu wasu a jau.
S.FORM: tu yau tababawan na wasu na paRin 'nay ya qaniyau atu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: tu jau taβaβawan na wasu na paʁin ʔnaj ja qanijau atu wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 他們在木頭上.
They were on the wood.

S.FORM: nani titaanna yau a biat 'nay uzusa tawnayan.
S.PHON: nani titaanna jau a βiat ʔnaj uz~rusa tawnajan.
S.FORM: nani titaanna yau a biat 'nay uzusa tawnayan.
S.PHON: nani titaanna jau a βiat ʔnaj uz~rusa tawnajan.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到那裡有兩隻青蛙.
They saw that there were two frogs there.

S.FORM: nani yauti pasayati mzaqis tababawan na paRin 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani jauti pasajati mz~raqis taβaβawan na paʁin ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: nani yauti pasayati mzaqis tababawan na paRin 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani jauti pasajati mz~raqis taβaβawan na paʁin ʔnaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)穩穩地爬上了那根木頭.

S.TRANSL: 穩穩地爬上了那根木頭.
climbed onto the wood steadily.

S.FORM: pasa libeng tmayta nani mwaza 'nay biat a yau talibeng na na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: pasa riβəŋ tmajta nani mwaz~ra ʔnaj βiat a jau tariβəŋ na na paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: pasa libeng tmayta nani mwaza 'nay biat a yau talibeng na na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: pasa riβəŋ tmajta nani mwaz~ra ʔnaj βiat a jau tariβəŋ na na paʁin a jau.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)往下看,看到樹下有很多隻青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 往下看,看到樹下有很多隻青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (They) looked downward and saw many frogs below the wood.

S.TRANSL: looked downward and saw many frogs below the wood.

S.FORM: tu taytaannati sayza na wiyati qaniyau nani taytaanna ya biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu tajtaannati sajz~ra na wijati qanijau nani tajtaanna ja βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: tu taytaannati sayza na wiyati qaniyau nani taytaanna ya biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu tajtaannati sajz~ra na wijati qanijau nani tajtaanna ja βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開,並且看著那些青蛙.
They left, looking at those frogs.

S.FORM: qawiyatiimi zinna tu biat 'nay.
S.PHON: qawijatiimi z~rinna tu βiat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: qawiyatiimi zinna tu biat 'nay.
S.PHON: qawijatiimi z~rinna tu βiat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 他對那些青蛙說 :「我們要走囉 !」
He said to the frogs, 'We are leaving!'

S.FORM: yauti tababawan na na paRin a yau ya biat a yau mniz mazmun.
S.PHON: jauti taβaβawan na na paʁin a jau ja βiat a jau mniz~r maz~rmun.
S.FORM: yauti tababawan na na paRin a yau ya biat a yau mniz mazmun.
S.PHON: jauti taβaβawan na na paʁin a jau ja βiat a jau mniz~r maz~rmun.
S.TRANSL: 木頭上就有了很多青蛙.
There are many frogs on that wood.

S.FORM: nayau ma maiti.
S.PHON: najau ma maiti.
S.FORM: nayau ma maiti.
S.PHON: najau ma maiti.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,沒有了.
That's all.
